benefits.description: Great weight loss on Tirz; Reta caused even more fat shredding after 3 months, going to 'another level'
On Reta: feels light with tons of energy due to GCG receptor activation and fat oxidation; increased energy expenditure
Both Tirz and Reta cut desire for alcohol; killed morning coffee desire; body rejects fatty or sugary foods; prefers healthier food

side_effects.description: On Tirz: appetite suppression felt unnaturally strong and overwhelming; always felt like being 'on something'

protocol_notes: Has used both Tirz and Reta. Prefers Reta over Tirz for fewer side effects and more natural feeling. On Reta for 3+ months with weight loss accelerating over time. Notes Tirz use before Reta may reduce appetite suppression effect of Reta.
